'''safanga''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:readdiction|readdiction]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-f-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:readdiction|readdiction]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| safanga
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:sæfængæth|sæfængæth]] || [[word:sæfængæj|sæfængæj]] || [[word:sæfængæsh|sæfængæsh]] || [[word:sæfængæ|sæfængæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:safafangath|safafangath]] || [[word:safafangaj|safafangaj]] || [[word:safafangash|safafangash]] || [[word:safafanga|safafanga]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:safangath|safangath]] || [[word:safangaj|safangaj]] || [[word:safangash|safangash]] || [[word:safanga|safanga]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:safafngath|safafngath]] || [[word:safafngaj|safafngaj]] || [[word:safafngash|safafngash]] || [[word:safafngaf|safafngaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:safangatha|safangatha]] || [[word:safangaja|safangaja]] || [[word:safangasha|safangasha]] || [[word:safangaka|safangaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:safangath|safangath]] || [[word:safangaj|safangaj]] || [[word:safangash|safangash]] || [[word:safanga|safanga]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:safangathal|safangathal]] || [[word:safangajal|safangajal]] || [[word:safangashal|safangashal]] || [[word:safangakal|safangakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:safangathatha|safangathatha]] || [[word:safangajaja|safangajaja]] || [[word:safangashasha|safangashasha]] || [[word:safangaka|safangaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:safangathan|safangathan]] || [[word:safangajan|safangajan]] || [[word:safangashan|safangashan]] || [[word:safangakan|safangakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:safangathaoro|safangathaoro]] || [[word:safangajaoro|safangajaoro]] || [[word:safangashaoro|safangashaoro]] || [[word:safangakaoro|safangakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|dea8a94}}
